panels.title: Brain UI shell and collapsible panels
panels.snapshot: BaiLongma source and deterministic build manifest
panels.persistence: visual state is browser-local unless a panel contract says otherwise
panels.revision: build manifest hash and pinned upstream commit
panels.recovery: rebuild from pinned source and replay patch queue
panels.ownership: shell contains no cross-Agent business state

panels.title: Identity, memory graph and thought stream
panels.snapshot: Agent bootstrap plus PostgreSQL Obsidian note projection
panels.command: Agent-scoped memory note and projection operations
panels.events: Runtime events projected into graph and thought state
panels.persistence: PostgreSQL canonical notes and projection outbox
panels.revision: note revision, projection digest and Scene revision
panels.recovery: server-side outbox retry and full graph resync
panels.truthSource: PostgreSQL Obsidian notes; Hermes receives bounded projections

panels.title: Central chat and conversation history
panels.persistence: PostgreSQL session/run metadata and Hermes conversation state
panels.revision: session message IDs and run IDs
panels.recovery: SSE reconnect, session reload and explicit run status
panels.ownership: authenticated owner must match Agent and Runtime
panels.truthSource: Hermes Runtime for execution; PostgreSQL for tenant metadata

panels.title: Declarative Scene projection
panels.snapshot: SceneSnapshot scoped to Agent and session
panels.persistence: PostgreSQL Scene projection only when recovery is required
panels.recovery: exponential reconnect, resync and full snapshot
panels.truthSource: BaiRui projection store, not BaiLongma Agent core

panels.title: Agent, model, security, search and map settings
panels.persistence: PostgreSQL encrypted references and desired configuration
panels.recovery: validated apply with rollback; restart is control-plane governed
panels.ownership: Agent owner settings; platform policy may restrict values
panels.truthSource: Platform configuration authority plus Hermes management state

panels.title: Voice recognition, wake and TTS
panels.snapshot: Agent voice capability and authorization status
panels.events: transcript, audio, interruption and run events
panels.persistence: encrypted provider references and optional artifacts
panels.recovery: reconnect voice session and resume text chat without false ready
panels.ownership: voice sessions and credentials are Agent-scoped
panels.truthSource: Hermes native capability first; FunASR and TTS adapters supplement

panels.title: Feishu, WeChat and social connection panels
panels.snapshot: Channel binding inventory and vendor handshake evidence
panels.command: pair, test, disconnect and delivery commands
panels.events: ingress, delivery receipt and channel health
panels.persistence: PostgreSQL channel bindings and encrypted references
panels.revision: binding generation and delivery lease sequence
panels.recovery: worker hot reload, retry and durable receipt replay
panels.ownership: channel binding belongs to one organization/user/Agent
panels.truthSource: Channel Bridge and vendor handshake, not a saved form

panels.title: Hotspot intelligence panel
panels.snapshot: normalized hotspot sources and collection time
panels.events: collection status and normalized result update
panels.recovery: cached result with explicit stale/error state
panels.ownership: shared source data, Agent-scoped view and actions

panels.title: Document and topic panel
panels.snapshot: Agent file/document index and selected artifact
panels.command: parse, open, close and read-aloud operations
panels.recovery: resume parse job and reload artifact by logical ID
panels.ownership: all files and artifacts are Agent-scoped
panels.truthSource: BaiRui file/artifact service and MinerU adapter

panels.title: Person and character card panel
panels.snapshot: validated card preview and current Agent identity
panels.events: import result and profile apply receipt
panels.persistence: Agent profile, SOUL and approved notes
panels.recovery: rollback profile revision; never auto-activate untrusted prompts
panels.ownership: preview and imported identity belong to one Agent

panels.title: Map and environment data
panels.snapshot: explicit unavailable state until a governed map/weather adapter exists
panels.recovery: show unavailable; never expose direct proxy credentials
panels.ownership: no direct browser credential or unrestricted proxy

layers.ui: native surface may be reused later

panels.title: Typhoon broadcast panel
panels.snapshot: explicit unavailable state until a product adapter is approved
panels.recovery: panel stays unavailable rather than returning fixture data
panels.ownership: no unrestricted iframe or host message bridge

panels.title: World Cup broadcast panel
panels.snapshot: explicit unavailable state outside an active supported product module
panels.ownership: no wildcard host messaging in the BaiRui shell

panels.title: Media history, playback and AI video
panels.snapshot: Agent artifact and media job inventory
panels.command: generate, cancel, save and download typed operations
panels.events: asynchronous job progress and artifact readiness
panels.persistence: PostgreSQL job metadata and artifact storage
panels.recovery: resume by job ID; external oEmbed must use a service adapter
panels.truthSource: BaiRui media adapters and artifact service
